name: apxm
description: APXM orchestration workflows for Codex: autonomous loop specs, councils, verified workers, graph execution, skill-to-workflow conversion, trace verification, and workflow following.

interface.longDescription: APXM packages reusable Codex skills for designing APXM-owned event-triggered loop specs, selecting verified workers, running traceable multi-perspective councils, converting skills into APXM workflows, executing APXM graphs through APXM server/Dekk, following live/offline workflow progress, and verifying traces.
defaultPrompt: Run an APXM Council on this decision.
Use APXM to orchestrate this task across agents.
Design an APXM autonomous event loop for this workflow.
Ask an APXM worker to propose a graph.
Follow this APXM workflow and replay its rollout.
